name: Barbecue Baked Beans
recipeIngredient: 2 Cans Pinto Beans, Rinsed And Drained
1/2 Teaspoon Hot Sauce, Or To Taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Heat 2 teaspoons of oil in a skillet over medium heat. Saute chopped onions, garlic, and green peppers until onions are lightly browned, about 10 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, combine all the remaining ingredients.
4. Lightly oil a roasting pan using the remaining teaspoon of oil.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared roasting pan and top with sliced onion.
6. Bake uncovered for one hour, or until the beans are browned to your liking.
